from source import quicksort
import pytest

def test_quicksort_preserves_length_and_sorts_with_duplicates():
    input_list = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    sorted_list = quicksort(input_list)
    assert sorted_list == sorted(input_list), f"Sorted list {sorted_list} does not match expected sorted list {sorted(input_list)}"
    assert len(sorted_list) == len(input_list), f"Length of sorted list {len(sorted_list)} does not match length of input list {len(input_list)}"
